profile_create_preview.title: Developer opportunities
generated_rules: Include paid TypeScript work with clear contact path.

rejection_rules: Reject unpaid internships and candidate CVs.
warnings: Drafted from the selected template; review the rules before saving.

diagnosis.label: Wrong-match pressure
diagnosis.detail: Recent wrong-match feedback suggests the profile needs clearer exclusion rules.

suspected_false_positive_patterns: Full-stack generalist items without clear profile fit
suggested_preference_rules: Exclude full-stack roles unless frontend ownership is explicit.

source_suggestions.label: Review noisy sources
source_suggestions.detail: Preview source topic or enabled-state changes before applying them.
